LESSON PLAN
Subject: Mathematics | Class: SSS2 | Board: WAEC

Objective: By the end of this lesson, students will be able to interpret the key concepts in Mathematics as specified by the WAEC curriculum.

Activity: Students work in groups of four. Each group receives a scenario card based on a familiar Nigerian context. They must interpret the relevant concept and present their findings to the class. Names used: Chidi, Fatima, Ngozi, Aminu, Taiwo, Adaeze.

Assessment: Exit quiz of five questions. Students scoring below 40% receive guided practice. Marks allocated per WAEC continuous assessment guidelines.
reference:
Lesson Plan: Mathematics | WAEC | SSS2
Objective: Students will explain key concepts in Mathematics.
Activity: Guided class exercise with Nigerian context examples.
Assessment: Short quiz to check understanding.
